title: altering table containing decimal causes corruption
description:
mysql> CREATE TABLE `test` (
    -> `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    -> `n` DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    -> `t` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    -> PRIMARY KEY (`id`))
    -> ENGINE=myisam;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)

mysql> ALTER TABLE test
    -> CHANGE COLUMN `n` `n` DECIMAL(10,2) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' ;
ERROR 1034 (HY000): Incorrect key file for table 'test'; try to repair it

The table is now broken and cannot be repaired.

mysql> select version();
+-----------+
| version() |
+-----------+
| 5.7.31    |
+-----------+
How to repeat:
CREATE TABLE `test` (
`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
`n` DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
`t` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
PRIMARY KEY (`id`))
ENGINE=myisam;

ALTER TABLE test
CHANGE COLUMN `n` `n` DECIMAL(10,2) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' ;

Might be something to do with 'DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL'
poc:
CREATE TABLE `test` (
-> `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
-> `n` DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
-> `t` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
-> PRIMARY KEY (`id`))
-> ENGINE=myisam;

ALTER TABLE test
-> CHANGE COLUMN `n` `n` DECIMAL(10,2) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' ;

CREATE TABLE `test` (
`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
`n` DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
`t` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
PRIMARY KEY (`id`))
ENGINE=myisam;

ALTER TABLE test
CHANGE COLUMN `n` `n` DECIMAL(10,2) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' ;
key_bug_features: Altering DECIMAL column with ZEROFILL causes table corruption
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `test2` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `n` DECIMAL(10,2) ZEROFILL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `t` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=myisam;
ALTER TABLE `test2` CHANGE COLUMN `n` `n` DECIMAL(10,2) UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT '0';
SELECT * FROM `test2` WHERE `n` IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE `test3` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `value` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`)) ENGINE=myisam;
